title: Epic RPG: Rarity System
description: This mod introduces an exciting tiered rarity system for weapons and armor
body:
Rarity & Tier System

This mod introduces a rarity and tier system: each rarity level adds one primary stat and three secondary attributes. Items progress through 15 tiers (from +1 to +15), and upon reaching certain tiers, they gain additional slots for secondary stats.

To unlock higher rarities, you need to obtain the Magic Find attribute. This attribute is key to obtaining higher rarities and more powerful equipment.

For each achievement completed (whether in the base game or any installed mod), the player permanently gains points in the Magic Find attribute. The chat will announce both the amount earned and the achievement completed.

# Tier Upgrade Table This table allows you to increase the Tier of your weapon or armor, enhancing its main attribute. Upgrade attempts may fail, and from Tier 6 to 15 each failure reduces the item's Tier by one level, while Tiers 1 to 5 remain protected. ![Tier Upgrade Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd2d625d2648126aebcf5fab059fc1dbbe75a11d.jpeg) # Deconstructor Table This table allows you to dismantle any piece of equipment with a rarity of Tier 1 or higher. By deconstructing weapons or armor, you obtain Fusion Fragments, and the amount received depends on the item's Tier level. ![Deconstructor Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e9fbc6d18407662068525cee2880a70fb2f3e1a.jpeg) # Reforge Table This table allows you to add or change the rarity of your equipment. The result depends on the amount of Magic Find (MF) the player has, making MF a key attribute for reforging and unlocking stronger rarities. ![Reforge Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a63bb3359fa7242c4437e78a1194c3574846dc9.jpeg) # Reroll Table This table allows you to add or change the secondary stats of your equipment. These attributes become available at Tier 5, Tier 10, and Tier 15, giving players the chance to customize and enhance their gear as they progress. ![Reroll Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e474e61f71fb7fc464d8ce49283a425a7fe154b1.jpeg) # Mini Tier Protector This item prevents your equipment from downgrading between Tier 6 and Tier 10 when an upgrade attempt fails. By applying the Mini Tier Protector, you safeguard your weapon or armor during this critical progression stage. ![Mini Tier Protector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f19acd6192352711699b8dfcb0d676d4b927f8e4.png) # Tier Protector This item prevents your equipment from downgrading between Tier 11 and Tier 14 when an upgrade attempt fails. By applying the Tier Protector, you safeguard your weapon or armor during these high-level upgrades, ensuring safer progression toward Tier 15. ![Tier Protector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e954d9934a0b706984c091a33febed54ce4bf8.png) # ***

 

🌐 Join Our Discord Community

Do you have new ideas, improvements for my mods, or have you found a bug? This is the perfect place to share them!

In our Discord community you can:

💡 Submit proposals and suggestions for improving the mods.

🛠️ Report problems and bugs so we can fix them together.

🎮 Show your creativity: you're free to use my mods in your own modpacks.

📢 Share your modpack on the server and show the community your unique style.

This space is designed for us to grow together, with respect and enthusiasm for creating mods and modpacks. Your contribution is always welcome!
